name: silicon-agent-hub
description: Virtual company marketplace — browse industry packs, agent store, workflow store. Create and operate any type of company with dynamically generated agents and workflows.

plugins.name: silicon-agent
plugins.description: Virtual company factory marketplace with 10 industry packs, 17 agents, 10 workflows. Supports SaaS, schools, construction, hospitals, semiconductor fabs, restaurants, and any custom company type. Dynamic task execution with free-form natural language.
